objective: Cycle 93 — C123: CardOverlay ARIA order + keydown leak + RunSummary save-compat

bugs_fixed: C123/CARD-ARIA-01 (HIGH): narrativeEl.textContent was set BEFORE overlayEl.classList.add('visible'), contradicting its own C86 comment. NVDA/JAWS missed live-region update on every card because element was not in accessibility tree yet. Fix: swapped order — visible first, then textContent. Affects every card interaction in every run.

C123/CARD-LEAK-01 (HIGH): per-button onKeyDown handlers (Enter/Space WCAG path) were never removed when 60s safety timeout fired. Closures captured btn+activate+activated+safetyId+resolve — retained entire Card object for 60s on mobile/low-memory. Fix: keyDownHandlers array stores {btn, handler} refs; safety timeout iterates and removes all before hideCard(). Combined fix for C122-01 and C122-03 (stale activate via detached nodes during 200ms highlight window).
C123/RS-NULL-01 (MEDIUM): state.run.cardsPlayed and state.run.anamThisRun rendered as 'undefined' string on cold/old save. Fix: ?? 0 guards on both addStat() calls in RunSummary.ts.
C123/RS-NULL-02 (MEDIUM): state.run.factionDeltaThisRun cast as Record without null guard — throws TypeError on old saves missing this field. Fix: (state.run.factionDeltaThisRun ?? {}) before cast.
audit_summary.c123_verdict: CLEAR — ARIA order correct (visible→textContent). keydown leak eliminated. RunSummary null guards for save-compat. 0 TS errors.
c123_confirmations: CardOverlay: overlayEl.classList.add('visible') now precedes narrativeEl.textContent = card.narrative
CardOverlay: keyDownHandlers[] tracks {btn, handler} per option; safety timeout removes all
Build: main=51.98KB gzip (+0.06KB), minigames=25.43KB gzip. 0 TS errors.
open_issues_deferred: LOW LAIR-01: No pause() API on LairResult.
LOW: potionBottles bloom (emissiveIntensity=0.25), stone elongation (InstancedMesh scale Y=5.33).
LOW C122-07b: triggerFlipAnimation 420ms timeout not cleared if hideCard() fires within window (cosmetic).
LOW C122-13: _skipOceanFrame naming inversion in CoastBiome.ts (readable comment fix only).
LOW C122-16: OghamPanel locked-ogham aria-label missing lock status announcement.
MEDIUM C122-18: mg_volonte live display (timeOnTarget/elapsedTime) vs score (timeOnTarget/totalTime) formula divergence.
